name: ImportBatchAndManifestRevision
description: Content-addressed immutable review state binding source evidence, decisions, and the exact later LEDGER requests.
schema_def: ImportBatch {batchId, sourceFingerprint, selectedAccountId, adapterIdentity, ledgerContractVersion, manifestSchemaVersion, statementPeriod, status, createdAt, updatedAt}
ManifestRevision {manifestRevisionId, batchId, revisionNumber, canonicalDigest, previousRevisionId?, committable, createdAt}

SourceRecordOutcome {manifestRevisionId, sourceRecordId stable across manifest and compatible-version changes, order, disposition: accepted_candidate|exact_duplicate|excluded_non_transaction|blocked, reasonCode, candidateId?, priorCanonicalRef?}

ImportCandidate {candidateId derived from accountId plus stable sourceRecordId plus immutable facts and independent of manifest revision, sourceRecordId, accountId, signedAmountMinor, currencyCode: ZAR, transactionDate, postingDate?, originalDescription, sourceReference derived from candidateId, provenance, ledgerIdempotencyKey derived from candidateId, frozenLedgerRequest, crossFileIdentity?}
ManifestApproval {approvalId, manifestRevisionId, manifestDigest, actor, trustedOsIdentity, approvedAt, active}

Manifest controls and validation results are immutable children. Source-derived financial facts never update; a changed decision creates a new revision. Initial adapters always leave crossFileIdentity absent.
